race.comment: TOES IN FIRST (3) bounced back sharply to form last start when skipping through the slop at Bordertown to score with plenty in hand as favourite. Hard not to follow up on. ROBERT THE PUSS (2) certainly doesn't win out of turn but shoulders peaks that measure up. Expect him to get right back from his wide alley and be saved for the final shot at them. BRUZANI (1) warmed nicely late here in his first two runs of the prep before putting it all together at Donald last time for a dominant win. The rise in trip suits and he gets a great chance to make it two on the bounce. DORA AURORA (7) was no match for TOES IN FIRST last time when clearly below her best but was a good winner here the start prior. Can bounce back. IMMORTAL ONE (4) has been freshened with 33 days after being pulled up at Donald. Jumped out well since and could find the frame.
